title: chylismia claviformis subsp. yumae
intro: Chylismia claviformis subsp. yumae, also known as Yuma claviform poppy mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chylismia claviformis subsp. yumae include its potential to treat wounds, soothe skin irritations, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
